data.content: Plan reviewed. Steps 1-8 are concrete and tied to acceptance criteria #1-#7. File-size mitigation (extract to opencode-event-translate.ts) is correctly identified as mandatory rather than optional. Hermetic test plan covers translator, normalizer, and formatter without touching real network/fs/env. Tool dedup (emit tool_use on first sight of a tool id, tool_result on terminal status) will be handled in the SSE consumer using a Set, keeping the translator pure. No invariant or constraint violations. Approved.
